title: stelis miranda
intro: Stelis miranda, also known as the False Yellow Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues such as fever, respiratory problems, and digestive issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stelis miranda include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote digestion. The herbal preparations of Stelis miranda include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the roots, leaves, or flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
